title: Fix karigar PDF export format, karigar name sync, and desktop sidebar overlap

requirements.text: Restore the karigar PDF export format in KarigarDetail.tsx so that the exported PDF groups orders by design code, displays the design image above each group, and lists all orders belonging to that design code below the image — matching the original KASI_orders_2026-02-27.pdf layout.

quotes: karigar export available with design image and order underneath it for each design code
KASI_orders_2026-02-27.pdf that's exactly how export pdf looks like

acceptanceCriteria: Exporting a karigar's orders as PDF produces one section per design code
Each section shows the design image (fetched from blob storage by design code) above the order rows
All orders for a design code are listed beneath that design's image in a table or list
The layout matches the grouped-by-design format of KASI_orders_2026-02-27.pdf

requirements.text: Fix the karigar name sync so that when a karigar name is updated on the Master Designs page (MasterDesigns.tsx / EditDesignModal.tsx), the updated name (e.g., Prasanna for design code CHTMN40046) is immediately reflected in the Total Orders tab and the Karigar tab. The karigar tab for Prasanna must show all orders mapped to that design code, and the Total Orders tab must display Prasanna instead of the old name SANTU for CHTMN40046.

quotes: Since karigar mapping was updated, the newly updated karigar name Prasanna shows in karigar tab but not in total orders tab against the design code CHTMN40046 it shows SANTU
in karigar tab, when Prasanna tab is selected no orders shows up there
We have a master design page where all design code, generic name, and karigar name is uploaded, and in that page only updation is also done.

acceptanceCriteria: After updating a karigar name on the Master Designs page, the Total Orders tab reflects the new karigar name for the affected design code without requiring a page reload
After updating the karigar name for CHTMN40046 to Prasanna, the Total Orders tab shows Prasanna (not SANTU) for that design code
Selecting the Prasanna tab in the Karigar section displays all orders mapped to CHTMN40046
The old karigar name SANTU no longer appears for CHTMN40046 in any tab after the update
Query cache for orders, karigars, and design mappings is invalidated after a karigar name update on the Master Designs page

requirements.text: Fix the desktop layout in App.tsx and AppSidebar.tsx so the sidebar and the main dashboard content do not overlap. The sidebar should occupy its own fixed or sticky column and the main content area should be offset correctly to sit beside the sidebar without any overlap.

quotes: When the app is viewed in desktop, the sidebar and main dashboard screen are overlapping.

acceptanceCriteria: On desktop viewport widths, the sidebar and main content area are displayed side by side with no overlap
The main content area begins where the sidebar ends and uses the remaining width
No content is hidden behind the sidebar on desktop

constraints: Do not change any feature or UI behaviour beyond the three issues described above
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All karigar name resolution must continue to use the Master Designs page as the single source of truth
nonGoals: Adding new pages or navigation items
Changing the Excel upload or order ingestion flow
Redesigning any UI beyond fixing the sidebar layout overlap
